ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the performance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument(s) used in the performance */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the courses table */,
  "ensemble_type" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the ensemble types table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_ensemble_type FOREIGN KEY ("ensemble_type") REFERENCES ensemble_types ("ensemble_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., instructor, student) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table for instructor-student relationships */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance being evaluated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the evaluation */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the evaluator (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_type" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the evaluation types table */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_evaluation_type FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_type") REFERENCES evaluation_types ("evaluation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion (e.g., interpretation, collaboration) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the criteria categories table */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight assigned to the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_criteria_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES criteria_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation the score belongs to */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion the score is for */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given for the criterion (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "score_comment" TEXT /* Comment for the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scores_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scores_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES evaluation_criteria ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., audio, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raters" (
  "rater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rater */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the rater */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role of the rater */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the rater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raters_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluator_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation the relationship belongs to */,
  "rater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rater in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" INTEGER /* Type of relationship (e.g., instructor, peer, self) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluator_relationships_rater_id FOREIGN KEY ("rater_id") REFERENCES raters ("rater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluator_relationships_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ensemble_types" (
  "ensemble_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ensemble type */,
  "ensemble_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ensemble type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ensemble_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_types" (
  "evaluation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation type */,
  "evaluation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criteria_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
